'''"Uncle" Vanya''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] crime boss from the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was Vanya who gave the [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']], a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400]], to a pilot in his employ named [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]. Through some creative accounting by Rendar's [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[LE-BO2D9|Leebo]], Vanya inadvertently paid to upgrade the ''Outrider'' to become a smuggling ship. After Rendar saved his life during an [[Security Police/Legends|Espo]] raid, Vanya gave up his grudge against him.
